titleStmt.title: SII 15.104: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 104. (B.K. No. 111 of 1929-30.) MUTTAGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the front wall, right side, of Saṅgamēśvara temple.
This is dated the 10th regnal year of the king, Pārthiva, Śrāvaṇa ba. 12, Thursday, corresponding to 1165 A.D., August 5.

It records a gift of income derived from the taxes Hejjuṁka, Vaḍḍarāvuḷa, Koḍavīsa, Kudureya-suṁka, and Kiṟukuḷa-suṁka, for worship, offerings, repairs, etc., in the temple of the god Rāmēśvara of Muttage by Rājādhyaksha, Suṅkavergaḍe Dāsimayya. The gift was entrusted into the hands of Rudraśaktimuni. Another gift of land to the god by prabhu Gōvinda is also registered. Muttage is described as an excellent agrahāra and the chief town of the kaṁpaṇa of thirty villages, situated in Tarddavāḍi Thousand.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . traiḷōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbha
vē . śrīkaḷacuriyānvayaratnākara saṁvriddhikara samudbhava pū¨rnnasudhākara biṁbaṁ nega
ḷdaṁ lōkaikastutyanenisi pe¨rṁmmāḍinripaṁ . negaḷdarāja samājapūjitapadaṁ pe¨rmmāḍi dēvaṁ
dharitrige rakṣā¨rtthade sākṣaradhvajane baṁdi¨rppaṁtiri¨rddaṁsuva¨rṇnagavēṁdradhvajanī dharāvaḷa
yamaṁ kāruṇyadiṁ pāḷisutte gajēṁdrādi parākramaṁ jananutaṁ śrīmāna hē
mācaḷaṁ . dīnanāthaṁgatiraudratējavahipaṁgatyugradaṁṣṭraṁ mahēśana ghōrānanadalli daḷḷi
suvudugrābhīḷalalāṭalōcanameṁtudgatamādudaṁtasedanā pe¨rṁmmāḍidē
vaṁge naṁdananī bijjaladēva nū¨rjjitayaśaṁ vairībhakaṁṭhīravaṁ . śrīprithvīvallabhanakhiḷa
prabhu rājādhirājanuddhataripubhūpa praḷayakālabhairavanapratimabhujapratā
pi bijjaladēvaṁ . tatpāda padmōpajīvitaruṁ . mahāmātya padavīvirāji
tarumappa sēnādhipati śrīkaraṇaṁ haridēvayya daṇḍanāyakara magaṁ rājā
dhyakṣaṁ suṁkave¨rggaḍe dāsimayyanāyakaru . © svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī
prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ kaḷacuri cakrava¨rtti bhujabaḷamalladēvava
¨rṣada hattaneya pā¨rtthiva saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa bahuḷa dvādaśi brihaspativā
radaṁdana byatīpātapa¨rba nimittadiṁ ta¨rddavāḍi sāsirada baḷiya kaṁpaṇaṁ
mūvattare modala bāḍaṁ śrīmaduttamadagrahāraṁ muttageya śrīrāmēsvara
dēva¨rgge nivēdyaṁ naṁdādīviga dēvaraṁga bhōgaṁ dēgulada maṭhada jī¨rṇnōddhāraṁ tapō
dhanara cātraraśanācchādanaṁ sale naḍevantiralu . Alliya taḷada hejjuṁka vaḍḍarāvuḷaṁ
mūvattaṁ koḍavīsaṁ kudureya suṁkaṁ kirukuḷe suṁkadāya�vaṁ . svastiya
ma niyamasvādhyāya dhyānadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhāna japasamādhi śīla saṁpaṁna
ruṁ parama naiṣṭhikarumappa . śrīrudraśaktimuni padavārijamaṁ kaḷcitaṁna kaimēlāgi
re dhāreyeṟedosadu koṭṭanudārateyiṁ dāsirājanū¨rjjita tējaṁ . Ā dibyatapōdhana
ramahimeyentena . Areveṇnākritiyaṁ karaṁ baḷiyanāgi¨rddaṁ haraṁ bhītiyiṁ siriyuttuṁga
ghanastanādrigaḷiṟuṁ bē¨rpokkaḍaṁgi¨rddanā narasiṁgaṁ kusmāyudhaṁgagidenippā kāmanaṁ
tūḷdi saccaraṇāghātade rudraśaktimunipaṁ beṁkoṇḍaneṁguṁ jagaṁ . © śrīmatu haridē
vadaṇḍanāyakara mahimōnnatike yenteṁdoḍe . paramajñānamayaṁ sarō
ruhabhavastutyaṁ munīṁdraṁ jagadguru sa¨rbbajñanenippagastyariṣivaṁśōttuṁga kī¨rtti dhvajaṁ
haridēvaṁ dvijarājapūjitaniḷālōkōttamaṁ dāni maṁdaradhai¨ryyaṁ patibhaktana¨rtthi janatā
saṁkalpa kalpadrumaṁ . Enisidagaṇyapuṇyadhananātmabhavaṁ vibhu dāsirājanī vananidhi
mēkhaḷākhiḷavasuṁdhare baṇnise dha¨rmmatatparaṁ manumunimā¨rgganaskhaḷitaśaucama
hābrati satyavākyanā¨rppinoḷamarēṁdrabhūruhamenalnegaḷdaṁ guṇaratna bhāṣaṇaṁ
© mattamoṁduttarōttaraṁ . © śrīrāmēśa śrīpādārādhakanenipa bācirājana
tanayanudāraṁ prabhu gōviṁdaṁ dhārayaneredittanaraḍu matta¨rkkeyyaṁ dhaṁṇīvallabha
ruṁ pradhāna puruṣa¨rddhaṁḍādhipa¨rnnāḍanāḷvarasa¨rppe¨rggaḍegaḷu samastakaraṇaṁgaḷu
nāḍugaḷu mattamī puradādi prabhugaḷu mahājanamu māraydendumī dha¨rṁmmamaṁ
paripāḷippudu taṁma dha¨rṁmmamidu tāṁ caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ . bahubhi¨rvvasudhā
dattā rājabhissagarādibhi yasyayasya yadā bhūmiṁstasya tasya tadāphalaṁ .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhi¨rvva¨rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . © ©
